task_completion.description: Navigate to the Studio to manage relationships for Opportunities or Bugs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: SuiteCRM Studio interface is open, specifically showing the Relationships section for either the Opportunities or Bugs module.

task_completion.description: Create a Many-to-Many relationship between Opportunities and Bugs.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Relationship creation screen showing the relationship type set to 'Many-to-Many' (or 'many-to-many') with Opportunities and Bugs selected as the primary/related modules.

task_completion.description: Save and deploy the new relationship.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created Many-to-Many relationship between Opportunities and Bugs is visible in the list of relationships for the module, indicating it was saved.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the target Opportunity or Bug record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detail view of the Opportunity 'GlobalMedia - 1000 Licenses' or the Bug 'Login page timeout error' is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Link the Bug record to the Opportunity record using the newly created subpanel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Bug 'Login page timeout error' is visible inside the Bugs subpanel on the Opportunity 'GlobalMedia - 1000 Licenses' detail view (or the Opportunity is visible in the Opportunities subpanel on the Bug detail view).

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Actions are performed within a web browser showing the SuiteCRM GUI, not via API requests or scripts in a text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or direct database queries to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL commands, PHP scripts, or direct database manipulation are used to create the relationship or link the records.

integrity.description: The agent did not fake the result by editing the page HTML.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to alter text or inject subpanel HTML manually.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Opportunity name is exactly 'GlobalMedia - 1000 Licenses'. The target Bug name is exactly 'Login page timeout error'. The required relationship type between Opportunities and Bugs is 'many-to-many'.
